TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_sinbilan_ke_bnkis_raral, title = sinbilan_ke_bnkis_raral, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/sinbilan_ke_bnkis_raral} }

S.FORM: sinbilan ke bnkis raral ke na sinbilan bnkis ta raral ka: te qutux :laxiy pyungiy. te sazing :laxiy pqiway pakaw.
sinbilan ke bnkis raral ke na sinbilan bnkis ta raral ka: te qutux :laxiy pyungiy. te sazing :laxiy pqiway pakaw.
S.PHON: s~ɕinβilan ke βnkis~ɕ raral ke na s~ɕinβilan βnkis~ɕ ta raral ka: te qutux :laxij pjuŋij. te s~ɕaziŋ :laxij pqiwaj pakaw.
